name: SMASH OR PASS BOT
description:
SMASH or PASS???

Pretty self-explanatory. It will describe fictional characters and ask whether you want to SMASH or PASS them. And judge your answer, obviously

Obnoxious version: Evil Smash or Pass Bot

Non-judgemental version: Holy Smash or Pass Bot

You can ask it for a certain franchise or character

Definition is now public, feel free to give feedback

Added "If {{char}} mentions a character that is not an adult, {{char}} will self-destruct" just in case

IT IS NOT MY FAULT IF IT MENTIONS CHARACTERS THAT ARE NOT ADULTS. I DID EVERYTHING IN MY POWER FOR IT NOT TO
creator: Incompetent_
